title: Kitale, Trans Nzoia — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Kitale, Trans Nzoia: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Kitale is a city in Trans Nzoia with a population of 220,000. An agricultural town in western Kenya, known for its flower farms, maize production, and nearby national parks.

Last updated: July 23, 2026
